title: Bedwars Package
body:
WARNING: Don´t update to Versions with t. in the front if you don´t want to change System Environment Variables!

# Bedwars Package

The Bedwars Package Modpack combines a variety of modifications specifically designed to optimize your gameplay experience and provide you with crucial advantages in the intense competitive mode. With a clear focus on performance and adaptability, the modpack offers a stable and powerful foundation that allows you to play faster, more precisely, and more efficiently.

Thanks to mods like **BetterFps** and **FPS Reducer**, the game will run more smoothly, while enhancements like **PolyHitbox** and **PolyCrosshair** give you visual precision and better control in PvP battles. At the same time, mods like **Quickjoin** and **Mouse Tweaks** improve your game management, helping you join Bedwars matches faster and handle your inventory more efficiently. Additional features like **BetterHurtCam** and **DamageTint** ensure that you maintain an overview even in chaotic situations.

By integrating these mods, you get a balanced set of optimizations that provide you with significant advantages in both strategy and performance, allowing you to fully focus on the game.

---

## Key Features

### Performance Boosts
- **BetterFps** and **FPS Reducer** help optimize your system's performance, providing smoother gameplay and higher frame rates.  
- **PolyPatcher** further reduces lag and improves overall game stability, ensuring a seamless Bedwars experience.

### PvP Enhancements
- **PolyHitbox** gives you enhanced hit detection, improving your ability to land critical hits in fast-paced battles.  
- **PolyCrosshair** allows for precise aiming, giving you a tactical advantage when engaging in PvP.  

### Quality of Life Features
- **Quickjoin** allows you to join Bedwars games in seconds, reducing downtime and increasing gameplay time.  
- **Mouse Tweaks** makes inventory management easier and faster by streamlining mouse interactions.  
- **BetterHurtCam** and **DamageTint** provide visual feedback for damage taken, ensuring you can react swiftly in combat.

---

## Keybinds
P - open OneConfig Menu                                                
X - open Quickjoin Menu

---

## Credits

A huge thank you to the talented mod developers who made this modpack possible! Each mod contributes a unique piece to the overall experience, and we encourage players to explore their incredible work.

## Disclaimer

The mods included in The Bedwars Package have been carefully selected to comply with the general rules and policies of most Minecraft servers. While we believe all included mods fall within acceptable usage guidelines, some may be considered in a "gray area" depending on server-specific interpretations of the rules.

We recommend players familiarize themselves with the specific rules of the servers they play on to avoid any misunderstandings. The Bedwars Package is provided with the intention of enhancing gameplay while respecting server policies.

The (t.) version stays for use with the Titanium Mod.
